entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop affected by downy mildew

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: A devastating disease of pearl millet caused by Sclerospora graminicola

entities.name: SCLEROSPORA GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: A biotrophic oomycete that causes downy mildew in pearl millet

entities.name: CHITOSAN NANOPARTICLES
entities.description: Nanoparticles synthesized from low molecular weight chitosan with a higher degree of acetylation used for seed treatment

entities.name: CHITOSAN
entities.description: The base polymer used to synthesize chitosan nanoparticles

entities.name: SEED GERMINATION PERCENTAGE
entities.description: The percentage of seeds that successfully germinate after treatment

entities.name: SEEDLING VIGOR
entities.description: The health and robustness of the emerging seedlings

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: Systemic and durable protection against downy mildew induced by CNP

entities.name: PHENYLALANINE AMMONIA LYASE
entities.description: A defense enzyme whose gene expression is upregulated by CNP

entities.name: PEROXIDASE
entities.description: A defense enzyme whose gene expression is upregulated by CNP

entities.name: POLYPHENOLOXIDASE
entities.description: A defense enzyme whose gene expression is upregulated by CNP

entities.name: CATALASE
entities.description: A defense enzyme whose gene expression is upregulated by CNP

entities.name: SUPEROXIDE DISMUTASE
entities.description: A defense enzyme whose gene expression is upregulated by CNP

entities.name: PR1
entities.description: A pathogenesis-related protein whose expression is increased by CNP

entities.name: PR5
entities.description: A pathogenesis-related protein whose expression is increased by CNP

entities.name: NITRIC OXIDE
entities.description: A signaling molecule that modulates the protective effect of CNP against downy mildew

entities.name: CPTIO
entities.description: A nitric oxide inhibitor used to study the role of NO in CNP-induced resistance

entities.name: GREENHOUSE
entities.description: Controlled environment where downy mildew protection was evaluated
